title: [FIRRTL][Windows] Crashing in ExtractInstances
body:
The ExtractInstances tests `Compose.fir` and `Simple.fir` are crashing on Windows.  It is crashing the first time it tries to extract an instance op, while walking the results of the instance op to gather port information. It is crashes when it reads the type of the 6th op result, which is the first out of line result.  Since this is the first time an instance is extracted, the pass shouldn't have modified the IR yet except to remove annotations.

It is crashing on the piece of code `inst.getResult(portIdx).getType().cast<FIRRTLType>()`

https://github.com/llvm/circt/blob/cdab344da59140eec977c2d0ab552fd2439a5b5b/lib/Dialect/FIRRTL/Transforms/ExtractInstances.cpp#L523-L525


This is a captured stack trace
```
Exception Code: 0xC0000005

 #1 0x00007ff71243794c llvm::PointerIntPair<mlir::Type,3,enum mlir::detail::ValueImpl::Kind,llvm::PointerLikeTypeTraits<mlir::Type>,llvm::PointerIntPairInfo<mlir::Type,3,llvm::PointerLikeTypeTraits<mlir::Type> > >::getPointer D:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\include\llvm\ADT\PointerIntPair.h:60:0
 #2 0x00007ff71243794c mlir::detail::ValueImpl::getType D:\a\circt\circt\llvm\install\include\mlir\IR\Value.h:63:0

 #7 0x00007ff712c15d54 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runPipeline(class mlir::OpPassManager &, class mlir::Operation *, class mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int, class mlir::PassInstrumentor *, struct mlir::PassInstrumentation::PipelineParentInfo const *) (d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe+0xbd5d54)

 #9 0x00007ff712c15343 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::runOnOperationAsyncImpl(bool) (d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe+0xbd5343)
#10 0x00007ff712c139e9 mlir::detail::OpToOpPassAdaptor::run(class mlir::Pass *, class mlir::Operation *, class mlir::AnalysisManager, bool, unsigned int) (d:\a\circt\circt\build_release\bin\firtool.exe+0xbd39e9)
```
